_comment: Context7 없이 동작하는 내장 라이브러리 패턴 DB

context7.api_notes: search_tool first for schema before any use_tool context7__*; <=3 query-docs per question; libraryId=/org/project; honest 'partial' fallback when no valid CONTEXT7_API_KEY; use researcher subagent (context7_self_loop_upgrade) for self-loop upgrades and meta analysis

replacements.new: search_tool 'context7' (or library) first to get schema
check context7_mcp_status; on 'partial' use local patterns + researcher

self-improvement.api_notes: Use context7_self_loop_upgrade() helper from auto-helpers; ALWAYS run auto-self-upgrade.sh after editing any file in self-improvement-critical.txt or SKILL/references/scripts; researcher output (self_loop_upgrade_proposals) must be consumed to close the loop
